summary.description: User-facing grounded answer. Write in clear prose suitable for a researcher.

decision.description: How completely the question was answered from retrieved knowledge.

evidence.description: Brief rationale describing which retrieved passages or entity IDs support the answer. Use knowledge_base_empty when the KB has no grounded material.

citations.description: Persisted entity IDs or other citation strings referencing source documents, trials, datasets, or labels.

lineage.description: Document-to-dataset-to-study lineage narrative when traceability is relevant; otherwise an empty string.

raw_source_trace.description: True when the answer is grounded in persisted knowledge-base entities with traceable source IDs; false when the KB is empty or nothing was grounded.
